summary: Repoint power-curve and training-zones stream queries to resources table (resource_type='streams').
reason: Both commands JOINed on the activities_streams typed table, which sync never populates. Individual stream fetches write to the generic resources table under resource_type='streams'. Repointed queries to resources JOIN on id. Added actionable error when no stream data is cached instead of silent all-zero output.
validated_outcome: Commands now query the correct table and return an error with instructions (run 'activities streams get-activity <id>') when no streams are cached.
